description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized human figure with intricate, geometric patterns and ornate detailing, reminiscent of Mesoamerican or Aztec art. The figure features a prominent headdress adorned with gold-colored bands and relief carvings, as well as a mask-like face with exaggerated features. The torso and lower body are decorated with armor-like elements and additional metallic accents, while the arms are bent at the elbows, holding a rectangular object at the front. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, with a large, flat surface and some geometric motifs. The entire piece is mounted on a rectangular base, giving it stability and presence. The primary materials appear to be stone or concrete with metallic embellishments, giving it a robust and ancient appearance.
description: A detailed, Mesoamerican-inspired stone sculpture of a human figure with a large ornate headdress and metallic accents, standing on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, headdress, and chest details, with the figure holding a rectangular object.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the headdress and the layered metallic bands, with visible arm and leg details.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a flat, less detailed back with geometric motifs and a large rectangular panel on the headdress.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the headdress's relief carvings and the figure's profile.
attribute_subject_matter: stylized Mesoamerican human figure with ornate headdress
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific environment.
